title: Glowing sea panorama
description: Changes the backdrop of your main menu to a amazing looking glowing sea.
body: This is another real background for the main menu of your game, this time it is a glowing sea in the night. The image I used for the background can be found [here](https://www.vecteezy.com/photo/48611515-enchantment-bioluminescent-plankton-lighting-up-the-waves-on-secluded-beach-under-starry-night-sky-nature-background), and as always I hope you enjoy this pack. The pack changes the main menu panorama into a image of the sea and doesn't change anything else in the game.
